study: Risk of Psychiatric Worsening With GLP-1 Receptor Agonist Use in Patie

The quote alone doesn't establish which estimand was intended or whether switching was balanced/informative, so neither rating can be confirmed as clearly correct from the given evidence — this requires human judgment with fuller study context.
